## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Backend tests pass.
- [ ] Frontend tests and production build pass.
- [ ] New behavior has automated or documented manual coverage.
- [ ] No private media, transcripts, models, databases, `.env`, or secrets are included.
- [ ] New network destinations, dependencies, models, and licences are disclosed.
- [ ] Offline operation, evidence traceability, and deletion behavior remain intact.
